note: Added state transition validation to Bind (Created only), Listen (Bound only), Accept/AcceptAsync (Listening only), Connect/ConnectAsync (Created/Bound only), Send/SendAsync (Connected only), Receive/ReceiveAsync (Connected only). Added ThrowIfDisposed() helper. Unified all disposal checks. SocketType, ProtocolType, Blocking, and SocketState enum were already implemented. All 48 related tests pass.
